chunks:
recipe:
  name: "Meeting Insights Extraction for Knowledge Base"
  category: "documentation_patterns"
  version: "1.2"
  created: "2026-01-23"
  updated: "2026-01-26"
  author: "Leo Celis / AI Assistant"
  
  master_intent_alignment:
    supports_intent: "framework/ivd/ivd_system_intent.yaml"
    supports_phase: "Continuous knowledge capture and pattern extraction"
    contributes_to: "Building executable understanding through systematic meeting processing and insight extraction"
    validates_constraint: "conceptual_focus (100% project-agnostic patterns), completeness (all meetings processed)"
  
  applies_to: "Extracting generalizable insights from meeting transcripts/notes to build knowledge bases"
  
  description: |
    Systematic pattern for extracting generalizable principles, patterns, and 
    insights from meeting notes/transcripts and incorporating them into a 
    living knowledge base document. Emphasizes conceptual understanding over 
    implementation details, making it suitable for book writing or training material.
    
    This recipe codifies the exact process used to develop the AI-Driven 
    Development Guide from 18+ training meetings, supporting the master intent 
    of creating an evidence-based, publishable book on AI-driven development.
  
  when_to_use:
    - "Building knowledge base from recurring meetings or training sessions"
    - "Creating living documentation that evolves with new learnings"
    - "Extracting patterns from practice to inform methodology"
    - "Developing training materials or books from real-world experience"
    - "Need to synthesize insights across multiple sessions"
  
  when_NOT_to_use:
    - "Meeting notes are purely tactical/operational (no generalizable insights)"
    - "One-time meetings with no recurring patterns"
    - "Verbatim transcription is the goal (not synthesis)"
    - "No need for cross-meeting pattern recognition"
    - "Documentation is for specific project only (not generalizable)"

intent_template:
  summary: "Extract generalizable insights from [meeting series] to build [knowledge base type]"
  goal: "Systematically review [N] meetings and extract patterns/principles for [target audience]"
  success_metric: "All meetings processed with [X]% concept coverage, [Y] total concepts extracted"
  stakeholders:
    - "Knowledge base maintainer/author"
    - "Future readers/learners from the knowledge base"

constraints_template:
  - name: "conceptual_focus"
    requirement: "Extract principles and patterns, not implementation details or code"
    current: "Checking each extraction for code examples or project-specific references"
    target: "100% of extracted concepts are project-agnostic and conceptual"
    test_method: "Manual review for code snippets or project names in extracted text"
    consequence_if_violated: "Knowledge base becomes implementation guide instead of conceptual framework"
  
  - name: "completeness"
    requirement: "No valuable insights left behind - multiple review passes"
    current: "Iterative review process with 'review again' cycles"
    target: "Diminishing returns on each pass (< 5% new concepts found)"
    test_method: "Track concepts found

current: "Checking each extraction for code examples or project-specific references"
    target: "100% of extracted concepts are project-agnostic and conceptual"
    test_method: "Manual review for code snippets or project names in extracted text"
    consequence_if_violated: "Knowledge base becomes implementation guide instead of conceptual framework"
  
  - name: "completeness"
    requirement: "No valuable insights left behind - multiple review passes"
    current: "Iterative review process with 'review again' cycles"
    target: "Diminishing returns on each pass (< 5% new concepts found)"
    test_method: "Track concepts found per review pass"
    consequence_if_violated: "Valuable insights missing from knowledge base"
  
  - name: "generalizability"
    requirement: "Insights must be applicable beyond original context"
    current: "Converting specific examples to general principles"
    target: "Each concept applicable to multiple projects/contexts"
    test_method: "Can concept be applied to different domain/project?"
    consequence_if_violated: "Knowledge base too narrow, limited reusability"

rationale_template:
  decision: "Use iterative extraction with multiple passes and meeting index tracking"
  reasoning: |
    - Single-pass extraction misses nuanced insights
    - Meeting index prevents duplicate processing
    - Version-controlled knowledge base shows evolution
    - Conceptual focus enables future book publication
    - Systematic approach ensures no meetings skipped
  evidence: 
    - "18 meetings processed with iterative 'review again' pattern"
    - "Multiple passes consistently found additional concepts"
    - "Meeting index tracks processing status and concept counts"

alternatives_template:
  - name: "single_pass_extraction"
    rejected_because: "Consistently missed 20-40% of valuable insights requiring 're-review' requests"
    date_considered: "2025-12-31"
    experiment: "Initial meetings processed once, user requested multiple re-reviews"
    conclusion: "Multiple passes essential for completeness"
  
  - name: "automated_extraction_only"
    rejected_because: "AI without human guidance tends to over-include tactical details, under-include strategic patterns"
    date_considered: "2025-12-31"
    experiment: "Early meetings had mix of tactical and strategic insights"
    conclusion: "Human-guided extraction with conceptual focus requirement needed"
  
  - name: "chronological_only_no_index"
    rejected_because: "Lost track of which meetings processed, risked duplicates or gaps"
    date_considered: "2026-01-10"
    experiment: "User requested meeting index to track status"
    conclusion: "Meeting index essential for systematic processing"

risks_template:
  - name: "concept_drift"
    condition: "If extracted concepts include code/implementation details"
    action: "Review and refactor to conceptual principles"
    monitor: "Check for code blocks, specific tool names, project references"
    threshold: "Any code examples or project-specific details"
    severity: "high"
    mitigation: "Maintain 'conceptual focus' constraint, regular audits"
  
  - name: "project_specificity_leak"
    condition: "If extracted

te_considered: "2026-01-10"
    experiment: "User requested meeting index to track status"
    conclusion: "Meeting index essential for systematic processing"

risks_template:
  - name: "concept_drift"
    condition: "If extracted concepts include code/implementation details"
    action: "Review and refactor to conceptual principles"
    monitor: "Check for code blocks, specific tool names, project references"
    threshold: "Any code examples or project-specific details"
    severity: "high"
    mitigation: "Maintain 'conceptual focus' constraint, regular audits"
  
  - name: "project_specificity_leak"
    condition: "If extracted insights contain project names, locations, companies, people, or specific tech"
    action: "IMMEDIATELY refactor to generic placeholders and patterns"
    monitor: "Grep for known project terms (company names, states, specific tools)"
    threshold: "ZERO project-specific references allowed"
    severity: "critical"
    mitigation: "Run quality gate test: 'Can this apply to different domain?' before finalizing"
  
  - name: "extraction_fatigue"
    condition: "If diminishing returns plateau before meeting all extraction criteria"
    action: "Take break, return with fresh perspective, or declare complete"
    monitor: "Track concepts found per pass"
    threshold: "< 2 new concepts found in full review pass"
    severity: "medium"
    mitigation: "Set realistic completeness targets, use meeting index to track progress"
  
  - name: "scope_creep"
    condition: "If knowledge base grows beyond maintainable size"
    action: "Split into multiple focused documents, create taxonomy"
    monitor: "Document length, time to find specific concepts"
    threshold: "> 10,000 lines or > 300 concepts"
    severity: "medium"
    mitigation: "Consider splitting by theme/category when growth becomes unwieldy"

implementation_pattern:
  structure: |
    framework/ivd/_private/                  # IVD's own training archive
    ├── meetings.md                          # Raw meeting transcripts (1,283 lines, 18 meetings)
    ├── ai_driven_development_guide.md       # Extracted insights (8,870 lines, evolved into IVD)
    ├── meetings_index.md                    # Processing tracker (18 meetings indexed)
    
    OR for new projects:
    
    [project]/_private/
    ├── meetings.md                          # Raw meeting transcripts/notes
    ├── [KNOWLEDGE_BASE].md                  # Extracted insights (living document)
    ├── meetings_index.md                    # Processing tracker
    └── [INTENT].yaml                        # This intent artifact
  
  workflow: |
    Step 0: Check for this recipe
        ↓
    Step 1: Create meeting index (if not exists)
        - List all meetings with dates, line numbers, titles
        - Track processing status per meeting
        - Track concept count per meeting
        ↓
    Step 2: Initial extraction pass
        - Read meeting notes thoroughly
        - Extract generalizable principles (not tactical details)
        - Cross-check against existing knowledge base
        - Add only NEW concepts (avoid duplication)
        ↓
    Step 3: Conceptual refactoring (CRITICAL STEP)
        - Remove

# This intent artifact
  
  workflow: |
    Step 0: Check for this recipe
        ↓
    Step 1: Create meeting index (if not exists)
        - List all meetings with dates, line numbers, titles
        - Track processing status per meeting
        - Track concept count per meeting
        ↓
    Step 2: Initial extraction pass
        - Read meeting notes thoroughly
        - Extract generalizable principles (not tactical details)
        - Cross-check against existing knowledge base
        - Add only NEW concepts (avoid duplication)
        ↓
    Step 3: Conceptual refactoring (CRITICAL STEP)
        - Remove ALL code examples with specific table/field names
        - Convert ALL project-specific references to generic placeholders
        - Replace: project names → generic labels (Source A, System B)
        - Replace: specific locations → [region_code], [location]
        - Replace: specific table names → target_table, source_table
        - Replace: specific field names → entity_name, custom_field, status_field
        - Replace: people names → generic roles (team member, manager, stakeholder)
        - Test every insight: "Could this apply to different domain?" If no, refactor more.
        ↓
    Step 4: Update meeting index
        - Mark meeting as processed
        - List key concepts extracted
        - Update total counts
        ↓
    Step 5: Iterative review passes
        - User requests "review again" if intuition says more exists
        - Deeper pass on same meeting
        - Update index with additional concepts found
        ↓
    Step 6: Version increment
        - Update knowledge base version number
        - Update "last updated" date
        - Commit changes
  
  extraction_principles:
    - "Conceptual over implementation: Extract patterns, not code"
    - "Generalizable over specific: Principle applicable broadly"
    - "Project-agnostic only: Remove ALL project names, companies, states, people, specific tools"
    - "Pattern over instance: One pattern from multiple examples"
    - "Why over how: Reasoning and principles, not steps"
    - "Deduplication: Check existing KB before adding"
    - "Progressive depth: Multiple passes reveal deeper insights"
  
  quality_gates:
    - "No code examples in extracted concepts (only generic patterns)"
    - "ZERO project references: no project names, companies, locations, people, or specific technologies"
    - "All examples must be generic placeholders (e.g., 'Source A', '[region_code]', 'target_table')"
    - "Each concept has clear title and explanation"
    - "Concepts are cross-referenced if related"
    - "Meeting index updated with processing status"
    - "Test: Can this insight apply to a completely different domain/project? If no, refactor."

verification_pattern:
  continuous_checks:
    - "Meeting index shows all meetings processed"
    - "Each meeting has concept count listed"
    - "Knowledge base version incremented"
    - "No code blocks with specific names (only generic patterns allowed)"
    - "ZERO project-specific references (grep test passes)"
    - "All examples use generic placeholders ([placeholder], Source A, target_table)"
    - "T

clear title and explanation"
    - "Concepts are cross-referenced if related"
    - "Meeting index updated with processing status"
    - "Test: Can this insight apply to a completely different domain/project? If no, refactor."

verification_pattern:
  continuous_checks:
    - "Meeting index shows all meetings processed"
    - "Each meeting has concept count listed"
    - "Knowledge base version incremented"
    - "No code blocks with specific names (only generic patterns allowed)"
    - "ZERO project-specific references (grep test passes)"
    - "All examples use generic placeholders ([placeholder], Source A, target_table)"
    - "Test: Show insight to someone unfamiliar with project - do they understand without context?"
  
  milestone_checks:
    - "After every 5 meetings: Review extraction consistency"
    - "After all meetings: Full knowledge base review for coherence"
    - "Quarterly: Refactor for clarity and organization"
  
  completion_criteria:
    - "All meetings marked as processed in index"
    - "Diminishing returns on review passes (< 5% new per pass)"
    - "Knowledge base coherent and well-organized"
    - "User satisfaction: 'No more to extract'"

examples:
  - name: "AI-Driven Development Guide from Training Sessions"
    location: "framework/ivd/_private/"
    domain: "Software Development / AI Integration"
    meetings_processed: 18
    concepts_extracted: "~150+"
    customization: |
      - Focused on AI development patterns
      - Evolved from v1.0 to v2.6 over time
      - Split some content to separate IVD framework book
      - Maintains conceptual focus for future book publication
      - Eventually evolved into IVD framework itself
    lessons_learned:
      - "Multiple review passes essential (user requested 're-review' frequently)"
      - "Meeting index critical for tracking progress"
      - "Conceptual focus requires constant vigilance (code creeps in)"
      - "Project-agnostic refactoring is NON-NEGOTIABLE (user will request review if project refs remain)"
      - "Version control shows evolution of understanding"
      - "Iterative extraction reveals deeper patterns over time"
      - "Pattern proved so valuable it became the methodology itself"
      - "Generic examples (Source A, [region_code]) preserve pattern while removing specifics"

references:
  - "framework/ivd/ivd_system_intent.yaml - System intent for IVD framework"
  - "framework/ivd/_private/ai_driven_development_guide.md - Output example (historical)"
  - "framework/ivd/_private/meetings_index.md - Tracking pattern"
  - "framework/ivd/_private/meetings.md - Source material example"
  - "framework/ivd/recipe-spec.md - Recipe specification"
  - "Pattern: Literate Programming (Donald Knuth) - Inspiration for documentation approach"

  how_it_helps:

    - "Ensures conceptual focus maintains pattern generalizability"
    - "Maintains evidence trail through meeting index and v

n"

alignment_to_ivd_framework:
  goal_supported: |
    "Make understanding executable, verifiable, and durable by extracting 
    generalizable patterns from real-world practice through systematic meeting processing"
  
  how_it_helps:
    - "Enables systematic knowledge capture from practice"
    - "Ensures conceptual focus maintains pattern generalizability"
    - "Maintains evidence trail through meeting index and version control"
    - "Provides repeatable workflow for continuous learning extraction"
    - "Prevents concept drift into implementation details"
  
  ivd_principles_applied:
    - principle: "1. Intent is Primary"
      application: "Templates require documenting extraction intent before execution"
      
    - principle: "2. Understanding Must Be Executable"
      application: "Quality gates and verification checks are concrete and testable"
      
    - principle: "3. Bidirectional Synchronization"
      application: "Multiple review passes ensure alignment between meetings and extracted patterns"
      
    - principle: "4. Continuous Verification"
      application: "Each meeting tracked in index, concepts verified for generalizability"
      
    - principle: "5. Layered Understanding"
      application: "Constraints → Rationale → Alternatives → Risks structure maintained"
      
    - principle: "6. AI as Understanding Partner"
      application: "Human-guided extraction with AI assistance, not automated extraction"
      
    - principle: "7. Understanding Survives Implementation"
      application: "Conceptual focus ensures patterns outlive specific project implementations"
  
  constraints_validated:
    - name: "conceptual_focus"
      requirement: "100% project-agnostic patterns"
      recipe_contribution: "Quality gates check for code/project-specific terminology"
      
    - name: "completeness"
      requirement: "All meetings processed with diminishing returns < 5%"
      recipe_contribution: "Meeting index tracks status, iterative passes ensure completeness"
      
    - name: "generalizability"
      requirement: "Patterns applicable across multiple domains/projects"
      recipe_contribution: "Test method asks 'Can this be applied to different domain?'"
